SNAP: Apply via ACCESS HRA — avg ~$230/month

cards.title: Housing & Shelter
cards.sub: Emergency shelter, supportive housing, vouchers, rental search
cards.body:
Emergency — Call 311 (24/7)
• Coalition for the Homeless ☎ 1-888-358-2384 — 129 Fulton St

DHS Intake Centers — all 24/7, ADA accessible, interpreters available:

• PATH Office — families with children under 21, single pregnant women
151 East 151st St, Bronx NY 10451 | ☎ (718) 503-6400 | All family members + ID required

• Adult Family Intake Center (AFIC) — married couples, domestic partners, adult families without children under 21
400–430 East 30th St (at 1st Ave), Manhattan NY 10016 | ID + proof of family relationship

• 30th Street Intake — single adult men (18+)
400–430 East 30th St (at 1st Ave), Manhattan | ID helpful, not required

• Franklin Women's Shelter — single adult women (18+)
1122 Franklin Ave, Bronx NY 10456 | ☎ (929) 281-2330 | ID helpful, not required

Transgender individuals may use the center matching their gender identity.

Supportive Housing:
• CUCS Housing Resource Center — 2090 Adam Clayton Powell Jr Blvd | ☎ (212) 801-3300
• Breaking Ground — 505 Eighth Ave | ☎ (212) 951-6900

Vouchers & Rental:
• NYC Housing Lottery
• HPD Affordable Re-Rentals — 100 Gold St | ☎ (212) 863-8000
• StreetEasy
• Homebase — eviction prevention — call 311

cards.title: Benefits Navigation
cards.sub: Medicaid, SNAP, cash assistance, HRA, SSA, energy help
cards.body:

HRA offices:
Manhattan: 109 E 16th St | Brooklyn: 15 MetroTech | Bronx: 1916 Monterey Ave | Queens: 165-08 88th Ave | SI: 4 Teleport Dr

• SSA Benefits — find office at ssa.gov
• HASA — ☎ (212) 971-0626
• HEAP — energy assistance
• YourPeer — benefit navigation tool

cards.title: Legal Aid
cards.sub: Tenant rights, immigration, civil legal help, eviction defense
cards.body:
NYC has right to counsel for eviction — refer immediately.

cards.title: Mental Health & Peer Support
cards.sub: NYC Well, peer connectors, NAMI, warmlines, FQHCs
cards.body:
This org refers — does not provide therapy.

• NAMI NYC Metro — 505 Eighth Ave Suite 1103 | ☎ (212) 684-3264
• Find an FQHC — sliding-scale therapy near you

cards.title: Grants & Funding
cards.sub: Who funds community coordination orgs in NYC
cards.body:
Foundation funders — LOI first:
• Robin Hood Foundation
• Tiger Foundation — small community orgs
• New York Community Trust
• Altman Foundation — workforce + education

Government: DYCD, NYC CEO, HRA contracts, Dept of Labor workforce grants

Before approaching anyone: 10+ tracked outcomes, volunteer hours logged, clean governance.

cards.title: Volunteer Operations
cards.body:
• 4–6 team leads → 8–10 volunteers each
• Every volunteer: signed agreement, confidentiality acknowledgment, role description
• Log hours — 50 × 4 hrs/week = ~$6,200/week in-kind value

• TechSoup — Google Workspace free for nonprofits
• Airtable — intake + referral tracking
• DonateNYC — in-kind donations
